arc_function: Establish supernatural threat while seeding multiple antagonist threads; wounded pride character arc initiates
dominant_engine: Supernatural creature pursuit combined with AI-exposition delivery system
state_progression: Protagonist encounters supernatural creature through direct confrontation
AI delivers mythological/legendary backstory through challenge-rebuttal debate
Secondary antagonist threat (technical destruction device) introduced via exposition
Humiliated character joins protagonist's cause after pride injury
Chapter ends mid-action with creature pursuing protagonist

turning_points.function: Initial encounter establishes creature threat while seeding Schmidt technological threat and ancestral legend connection simultaneously

reusable_mechanisms: AI character delivers exposition through debate with protagonist
Mythological origin story recontextualized as literal historical event
Supernatural creature pursues protagonist after initial encounter
Wounded pride drives character to seek redemption through dangerous mission
Character with technical skills joins protagonist's cause after being humbled
failure_modes: LLM output parsing failure flagged in source data
Too many plot threads introduced simultaneously without resolution
Excessive exposition delivered through AI dialogue dumps
Source text contains garbled/missing characters affecting readability
Chapter ends mid-action without narrative resolution

craft_profile.pov_distance: Close third-person through protagonist with frequent internal monologue
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Short punchy sentences in dialogue contrasting with longer explanatory passages for exposition
craft_profile.paragraphing: Scene breaks marked with chapter heading markers, ellipsis used for pacing pauses
craft_profile.dialogue_method: AI and protagonist engage in challenge-rebuttal pattern for exposition delivery
craft_profile.description_method: Minimal sensory description, focus on action consequences and character reactions
craft_profile.exposition_method: AI provides theoretical frameworks to explain supernatural elements
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter concludes with creature's approach as cliffhanger
craft_profile.transition_method: Narrative interweaves multiple plot threads without clear scene breaks
